name: Raspberries

pros.title: polyphenol content adds extra upside
pros.explanation: That gives it a useful antioxidant angle beyond the visible sugar and fibre story.

pros.title: contains useful polyphenols
pros.explanation: Adds extra plant-compound value beyond the base nutrient display.

pros.title: light for the volume
pros.explanation: A practical advantage for a sweet food.

cons.title: quite perishable
cons.explanation: Storage life is not amazing compared with sturdier fruits.

cons.title: can be pricey
cons.explanation: Cost can limit how practical it is as a staple fruit.

cons.title: protein contribution is negligible
cons.explanation: Not a real flaw for fruit, but still basically absent.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
